title: pocockia lunata
intro: Pocockia lunata, also known as Moon Wreath, is a flowering plant native to New Zealand. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Pocockia lunata include reducing inflammation, relieving congestion, and soothing sore throats. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
